The '''Tof Soren Hunting Rifle''', also known as the "'''Hunter'''," was a [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] produced in [[Tof Soren]] on [[Ord Vaxal]].

The Tof Soren Hunting Rifle could fire five shots before having to be reloaded. It used a 5-shot internal magazine. The weapon was equipped only with iron sights, but could be optionally equipped with simple telescopic sights. It used a powder charge to fire bullets of approximately 6 [[Millimeter/Legends|millimeters]] in diameter. Maximum effective range was 300 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].
